concerns.text: FR-032 performs Fisher's exact tests for multiple subgroups (domain, year) without multiple testing correction. With multiple hypotheses, Type I error rate inflates. Specify correction method (e.g., Bonferroni, FDR) or limit subgroup tests to pre-specified hypotheses.

FR-026 conflates Monte Carlo statistical validation with schema contract tests. These are distinct validation types: Monte Carlo verifies statistical correctness; schema tests verify data structure. Separate these validation streams to avoid conflating code correctness with data format compliance.

Bias adjustment (FR-027) uses domain-weighted averaging but does not specify weight calculation method (e.g., inverse domain proportion, equal weighting). Clarify weight formula to ensure reproducibility.
